findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name OGNL/SpEL evaluation in Discovery Client Route Definitions
 * @description Expression language evaluation in route configuration processing
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/el-injection-route-discovery
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking

// Find all SpEL expression parsing calls in the gateway codebase
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("parseExpression") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.springframework.expression", "ExpressionParser")
select mc, "SpEL expression parsing found in: " + mc.getCaller().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getCaller().getName()
findings.hypothesis: SpEL expression parsing calls in the gateway codebase that could be vulnerable to injection

message.text: SpEL expression parsing found in: DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator.getRouteDefinitions
SpEL expression parsing found in: DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator.getRouteDefinitions
SpEL expression parsing found in: DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator.getValueFromExpr
SpEL expression parsing found in: ShortcutConfigurable.getValue

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ShortcutConfigurable SpEL injection via route filter args
 * @description Route filter/predicate arguments flowing through ShortcutConfigurable.getValue into SpEL evaluation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shortcut-configurable-spel
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find what flows into ShortcutConfigurable.getValue parameter
from Method m, Parameter p
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.springframework.cloud.gateway.support", "ShortcutConfigurable") and
  m.hasName("getValue") and
  p = m.getAParameter()
select m, "ShortcutConfigurable.getValue has parameter: " + p.getType() + " " + p.getName() + " at index " + p.getPosition()
findings.hypothesis: ShortcutConfigurable.getValue receives route filter/predicate string arguments and evaluates them as SpEL expressions

message.text:
ShortcutConfigurable.getValue has parameter: String entryValue at index 2
ShortcutConfigurable.getValue has parameter: BeanFactory beanFactory at index 1
ShortcutConfigurable.getValue has parameter: SpelExpressionParser parser at index 0

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ConfigurationService normalizeValue passes args to SpEL
 * @description ConfigurationService normalizes route filter/predicate configuration values which may call ShortcutConfigurable.getValue
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/config-service-spel-chain
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 */

import java

// Find all callers of ShortcutConfigurable.getValue
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("getValue") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.springframework.cloud.gateway.support", "ShortcutConfigurable")
select mc, "Call to ShortcutConfigurable.getValue in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " at " + mc.getFile().getBaseName() + ":" + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - arg2=" + mc.getArgument(2)
findings.hypothesis: Identify all callers of ShortcutConfigurable.getValue to understand the full attack surface

message.text: Call to ShortcutConfigurable.getValue in .normalize at ShortcutConfigurable.java:94 - arg2=getValue(...)
Call to ShortcutConfigurable.getValue in .apply at ShortcutConfigurable.java:113 - arg2=value
Call to ShortcutConfigurable.getValue in .normalize at ShortcutConfigurable.java:136 - arg2=lastValue
Call to ShortcutConfigurable.getValue in .apply at ShortcutConfigurable.java:140 - arg2=value

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractGatewayControllerEndpoint methods accepting route definitions
 * @description List all public methods in actuator controller that accept body params
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/actuator-endpoint-methods
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 */

import java

from Method m, Parameter p
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.springframework.cloud.gateway.actuate", "AbstractGatewayControllerEndpoint") and
  p = m.getAParameter() and
  m.isPublic()
select m, "Method: " + m.getName() + "(" + p.getType().getName() + " " + p.getName() + ") in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Enumerate all public actuator endpoint methods with parameters to understand attack surface

Method: delete(String id) in AbstractGatewayControllerEndpoint

Method: save(String id) in AbstractGatewayControllerEndpoint
Method: save(RouteDefinition route) in AbstractGatewayControllerEndpoint
Method: setApplicationEventPublisher(ApplicationEventPublisher publisher) in AbstractGatewayControllerEndpoint
Method: route(String id) in GatewayControllerEndpoint
Method: route(String id) in GatewayLegacyControllerEndpoint

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name DiscoveryLocatorProperties SpEL expressions used unsafely
 * @description The includeExpression and urlExpression from DiscoveryLocatorProperties are configured 
 *              with defaults that use SpEL with service data, potentially injectable
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/discovery-locator-spel-defaults
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 */

import java

// Check what getPredicates/getFilters return in DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator
// and what the SpEL expressions look like
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.springframework.cloud.gateway.discovery", "DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getPredicates") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getFilters") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getIncludeExpression") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getUrlExpression") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getPredicateExpression") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getFilterExpression")
  )
select mc, "Method call: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + " in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName()
findings.hypothesis: DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator uses configurable SpEL expressions from DiscoveryLocatorProperties, some of which can be influenced by service metadata

message.text: Method call: getIncludeExpression() at line 82 in getRouteDefinitions
Method call: getUrlExpression() at line 83 in getRouteDefinitions
Method call: getIncludeExpression() at line 86 in getRouteDefinitions
Method call: getIncludeExpression() at line 86 in getRouteDefinitions

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SetPath and RewritePath filter factories use SpEL template expressions
 * @description SetPath and RewritePath filter factories parse their configuration values as SpEL templates
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/setpath-rewritepath-spel
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 */

import java

// Find all parseExpression calls across the entire codebase 
from MethodCall mc, Expr arg
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("parseExpression") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.springframework.expression", "ExpressionParser") and
  arg = mc.getArgument(0)
select mc, "parseExpression called with: " + arg + " in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: All SpEL parseExpression calls in the gateway codebase with argument details

message.text: parseExpression called with: getIncludeExpression(...) in DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator.getRouteDefinitions at line 82
parseExpression called with: getUrlExpression(...) in DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator.getRouteDefinitions at line 83
parseExpression called with: getValue(...) in DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator.getValueFromExpr at line 143
parseExpression called with: entryValue in ShortcutConfigurable.getValue at line 59

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Taint flow from discovery service metadata to SpEL evaluation
 * @description Service instance metadata (from external discovery service) flows into SpEL expression evaluation
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/discovery-metadata-to-spel
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 *       external/cwe/cwe-094
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module DiscoverySpELConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // Service instance metadata from discovery clients (external source)
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getMetadata") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getServiceInstances") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getServices") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getInstanceId") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getHost") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getUri") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("get") // Map.get() for metadata access
      ) and
      mc.getFile().getRelativePath().matches("%DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator%") |
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
    or
    // Parameters flowing from discovery locator properties
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getPredicates") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getFilters") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getUrlExpression") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getPredicateExpression") or
        mc.getMethod().hasName("getFilterExpression")
      ) |
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("parseExpression") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
        "org.springframework.expression", "ExpressionParser") |
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getArgument(0)
    )
  }
}

module DiscoverySpELFlow = TaintTracking::Global<DiscoverySpELConfig>;
import DiscoverySpELFlow::PathGraph

from DiscoverySpELFlow::PathNode source, DiscoverySpELFlow::PathNode sink
where DiscoverySpELFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Discovery metadata flows to SpEL evaluation from $@.", source.getNode(), "this source"
findings.hypothesis: External discovery service metadata (service names, metadata map values) flows into SpEL parseExpression, enabling SpEL injection

message.text: Discovery metadata flows to SpEL evaluation from [this source](1).

findings.hypothesis: The entryValue parameter of ShortcutConfigurable.getValue is processed through SpEL without sanitization

message.text: ShortcutConfigurable entryValue flows to SpEL parseExpression from [entryValue parameter](1).

findings.hypothesis: ConfigurationService.bind() passes filter/predicate args map values through ShortcutConfigurable into SpEL evaluation

message.text:
Route definition args flow to SpEL from [route args source](1).
Route definition args flow to SpEL from [route args source](2).

Route definition args flow to SpEL from [route args source](1).
Route definition args flow to SpEL from [route args source](2).

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator SpEL with service name
 * @description Service name from discovery client used as SpEL expression in route predicates/filters
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/discovery-spel-service-name
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking

// Look at context: what value is passed as arg to parseExpression in DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator
from MethodCall parseExpr, MethodCall mc
where
  parseExpr.getMethod().hasName("parseExpression") and
  parseExpr.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.springframework.cloud.gateway.discovery", "DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator") and
  TaintTracking::localTaint(DataFlow::exprNode(mc), DataFlow::exprNode(parseExpr.getArgument(0))) and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.springframework.cloud.gateway.discovery", "DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator")
select parseExpr, "SpEL parseExpression at line " + parseExpr.getLocation().getStartLine() + " receives tainted value from: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: What specific values from DiscoveryClient are passed to SpEL parseExpression

message.text: SpEL parseExpression at line 82 receives tainted value from: getIncludeExpression() at line 82
SpEL parseExpression at line 83 receives tainted value from: getUrlExpression() at line 83
SpEL parseExpression at line 143 receives tainted value from: getValue() at line 143

findings.hypothesis: FilterDefinition.getArgs() and PredicateDefinition.getArgs() map values flow into ShortcutConfigurable SpEL evaluation

message.text:
Filter/Predicate args map flows to SpEL parseExpression from [getArgs() call](1).
Filter/Predicate args map flows to SpEL parseExpression from [getArgs() call](2).

Filter/Predicate args map flows to SpEL parseExpression from [getArgs() call](1).
Filter/Predicate args map flows to SpEL parseExpression from [getArgs() call](2).

findings.hypothesis: User-controlled values flow all the way to Expression.getValue() execution, confirming full SpEL injection

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name GatewayControllerEndpoint save(RouteDefinition) - actuator POST endpoint for route creation
 * @description Confirms the actuator HTTP POST endpoint that accepts RouteDefinition (CVE-2022-22947 entry point)
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/actuator-save-route-endpoint
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 *       external/cwe/cwe-094
 */

import java

// Find the save method accepting RouteDefinition and any Spring annotations on it
from Method m, Parameter p
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.springframework.cloud.gateway.actuate", "AbstractGatewayControllerEndpoint") and
  m.hasName("save") and
  p = m.getAParameter() and
  p.getType().getName() = "RouteDefinition"
select m, "Actuator save(RouteDefinition) entry point in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName() + " at line " + m.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - parameter: " + p.getName() + " of type " + p.getType().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Confirm the actuator HTTP endpoint that is the external entry point for route definitions

message.text: Actuator save(RouteDefinition) entry point in AbstractGatewayControllerEndpoint at line 136 - parameter: route of type RouteDefinition

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name External input via DiscoveryClient service metadata to SpEL - full path confirmed
 * @description Confirms DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator passes predicate/filter expression args
 *              containing service metadata through getArgs().values() into parseExpression/getValue
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/discovery-full-spel-path
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-917
 *       external/cwe/cwe-094
 */

import java

// Find the getValueFromExpr method that does direct parseExpression + getValue on incoming value
from Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.springframework.cloud.gateway.discovery", "DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator") and
  m.hasName("getValueFromExpr")
select m, "getValueFromExpr() method in DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator - takes external expression string and evaluates via SpEL parseExpression().getValue() at line " + m.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: getValueFromExpr method in DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator directly parses and evaluates strings as SpEL

message.text: getValueFromExpr() method in DiscoveryClientRouteDefinitionLocator - takes external expression string and evaluates via SpEL parseExpression().getValue() at line 140
